response:
The **cheapest widely recommended alternatives to Klaviyo** are Brevo, MailerLite, Moosend, Omnisend, ActiveCampaign, and Sender, all of which undercut Klaviyo’s pricing for similar list sizes while still offering solid automation and ecommerce features.[3][5][2]

Here’s a concise breakdown focused on *cost vs. features*:

| Tool | Why it’s cheaper / standout | Typical starting paid price* | Best for |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Brevo (Sendinblue)** | Often cited as the **budget-friendly Klaviyo alternative**, with unlimited contacts and pay-by-email-volume pricing.[4][7] Includes CRM, SMS, WhatsApp.[4][3] | Around **$9–15/mo** depending on plan.[2][4] | Small–mid businesses wanting **email + SMS** at low cost. |
| **MailerLite** | Explicitly recommended as the **best low‑cost alternative** to Klaviyo.[5] Clean UI, automation, website/landing pages; very affordable tiers.[3][5] | From about **$10–12/mo**.[3][5] | Newer senders and stores needing **simple but reliable** email automation. |
| **Moosend** | Highlighted as a **cost-effective automation** platform “at a fraction of the cost” of Klaviyo.[3] Strong automation for the price.[3][5] | From about **$9/mo**.[3] | Budget‑conscious brands wanting **advanced automation** without Klaviyo pricing. |
| **Omnisend** | Ecommerce‑focused like Klaviyo but “notably cheaper… at the same subscriber count.”[4][7] Strong Shopify integration and ready-made flows.[3][4] | From about **$16/mo**.[2][3] | Shopify/WooCommerce stores needing **email + SMS** with prebuilt ecommerce flows. |
| **ActiveCampaign** | Cheaper entry than Klaviyo in many cases, with one of the best **automation engines**.[2][3][5] | From about **$15/mo**.[2][3] | Businesses that care more about **sophisticated automation/CRM** than built‑in ecommerce extras. |
| **Sender** | Frequently mentioned for having the **most generous free plan** and low paid tiers.[2][3][4] | From about **$7–10/mo**.[2][3] | Very small businesses needing **max value at minimal cost**. |
| **Campaign Monitor** | Strong templates and deliverability; competitive pricing versus Klaviyo.[3][1] | From **$9–12/mo**.[1][3] | Brands prioritizing **design and ease of use**. |

\*Prices are approximate and can vary by region, list size, and billing cycle; always check current pricing.

Key pricing context vs Klaviyo:
- Klaviyo charges around **$45/month for ~1,000–1,500 contacts** and **$150/month for ~10,000 contacts**, and has raised prices multiple times in recent years.[7]
- Several tools above (especially **Brevo, Omnisend, MailerLite, Moosend, Sender**) offer **comparable or sufficient features at significantly lower monthly costs** for similar list sizes.[7][3][5]

If you tell me:
- your list size,
- whether you need SMS, and
- your ecommerce platform (Shopify, WooCommerce, etc.),  

I can narrow this to 1–2 best-value picks for your specific situation.
